trigger.description: Swarm brief collects RCH posture while the fleet is remote-ready but the selected worker cannot map this workspace path topology.
setup_commands: # status payload includes workersHealthy=3, selectedWorker=css, and absolute canonical/alias roots that must be redacted
# run swarm brief --include-rch in a workspace whose path dependencies cannot be mapped onto the selected worker

expected_emission.repair_string: Inspect RCH worker path mapping; remote workers are visible but this workspace cannot be mapped.
